title: Cuddle™ Cotton Gauze Summer Blanket | Summer Lightweight, Breathable Soft Throw |Thin Cotton Throw Blanket
detail_text: Pure Cotton Gauze Towel Blanket Available In: Dark Grey, Light Grey, Blue, Tiffany, Pink, Dark Blue, Camel Material: 100% Cotton Size: Super Single 150x200cm Introducing our pure cotton cooling gauze towel blanket , the perfect addition to your bedding collection for those warm summer nights or for anyone who naturally runs hot. Cotton fibers are excellent at absorbing moisture, which means they can wick away sweat and humidity from your skin, helping you stay dry and comfortable. Our cotton gauze towel blanket is lightweight and easy to move around, making it perfect for summer nights when you want just a little bit if coverage. It is also gentle and hypoallergenic, making it a great choice for people with sensitive skin. Our pure cotton gauze towel blanket can be used in a variety of ways, from covering yourself while you sleep to draping it over your sofa for a stylish and functional decor accent.
detail_html:
Pure Cotton Gauze Towel Blanket

Available In:

Dark Grey, Light Grey, Blue, Tiffany, Pink, Dark Blue, Camel

Material: 100% Cotton

Size: Super Single 150x200cm

Introducing our pure cotton cooling gauze towel blanket, the perfect addition to your bedding collection for those warm summer nights or for anyone who naturally runs hot. 

Cotton fibers are excellent at absorbing moisture, which means they can wick away sweat and humidity from your skin, helping you stay dry and comfortable. Our cotton gauze towel blanket is lightweight and easy to move around, making it perfect for summer nights when you want just a little bit if coverage. It is also gentle and hypoallergenic, making it a great choice for people with sensitive skin. 

Our pure cotton gauze towel blanket can be used in a variety of ways, from covering yourself while you sleep to draping it over your sofa for a stylish and functional decor accent.
